title: 演示科技发布新一代 AI 推理芯片，已获三家头部云厂商试订单
title_en: Demo Tech unveils next-gen AI inference chip with trial orders from three major cloud vendors
summary: 公司宣布新一代推理芯片进入量产前验证阶段，已与三家国内头部云厂商签署试订单。管理层预计 2024 下半年贡献增量收入，但量产良率仍需观察。
summary_en: The company said its next inference chip entered pre-mass-production validation and signed trial orders with three leading domestic cloud vendors. Management expects incremental revenue in H2 2024, but yield rates still need monitoring.

title: 监管问询：演示科技需补充披露前五大客户收入占比
title_en: Regulatory inquiry: Demo Tech asked to disclose top-five customer revenue mix
summary: 交易所对公司 2023 年报发出问询函，要求补充披露前五大客户收入占比、应收账款账龄及回款情况。公司回应称将在规定期限内回复。
summary_en: The exchange issued an inquiry on the 2023 annual report, requesting disclosure of top-five customer revenue share, receivables aging, and collection status. The company said it will respond within the required timeline.

title: 演示科技研发投入同比增 18%，继续加码大模型基础设施
title_en: Demo Tech R&D spend up 18% YoY as it expands LLM infrastructure
summary: 2023 年研发费用 8.002 亿元，同比增长 18%。公司表示资金主要用于训练集群扩容与推理优化，短期仍可能压制利润率。
summary_en: 2023 R&D expense reached 800.2M CNY, up 18% YoY. The company said spending focused on training cluster expansion and inference optimization, which may pressure margins near term.
